description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows_x86 that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: prebuild and build. The prebuild job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks if the workflow should be skipped using fkirc/skip-duplicate-actions, and outputs the result. The build job depends on prebuild, runs on ubuntu-20.04 if prebuild doesn't indicate skipping, checks out the code, installs required packages, prepares the build environment, configures CMake, builds the project, and uploads the executable and package as artifacts.
